summary: The diff demonstrates comprehensive implementation of REQ-13 to eliminate blinking/flashing effects. Changes include removal of fade-in animations from HeroSection.tsx and ChatMessage.tsx components, elimination of custom animation keyframes and timing functions from tailwind.config.js (except required accordion animations), and removal of transition/pulse animations from index.css. The implementation preserves essential loading states (spinners, skeleton loaders) while eliminating visual flickering effects.
